name: Trinseo PLC
business: Trinseo PLC is a specialty material solutions provider. Its products are incorporated into building & construction, automotive, paper and board, appliances, packaging, textile, consumer electronics, and medical applications. The company operates four segments: Engineered Materials, Latex Binders, Polymer Solutions, and Americas Styrenics.

exposures.sentence: Trinseo PLC is a specialty material solutions provider with a focus on partnering with companies to bring ideas to life in an imaginative, smart, and sustainability-focused manner.

Additionally, we believe growth prospects are bolstered by sustainability trends such as electric vehicles and potential government mandates, such as the substitution of lighter-weight plastics for metal in automobiles.

Our Engineered Materials segment consists of rigid thermoplastic compounds and blends products sold into high growth and high value applications in markets such as consumer electronics, medical and automotive

Our Engineered Materials segment consists of rigid thermoplastic compounds and blends products sold into high growth and high value applications in markets such as consumer electronics, medical and automotive

Our products are incorporated into a wide range of our customers products throughout the world, including products for building and construction, automotive applications, paper and board, appliances, packaging, textile, and consumer electronics, among others.

We have a polycarbonate (PC) dissolution pilot facility in our Terneuzen, the Netherlands plant, a polymethyl methacrylates (PMMA) depolymerization plant in Rho, Italy and an acrylonitrile butadiene styrene (ABS) dissolution pilot facility in Terneuzen, the Netherlands.
Sustainable products represented 5% of Engineered Materials segment volume in 2025 and are a core growth area.
